query:
-- Get Mega Electrics Xero billing items (account E-884448 from the screenshot)
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.invoiceDate, bi.contactName, bi.description, 
       bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.lineAmount, bi.accountCode, bi.category,
       bi.customerExternalId, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.matchStatus, bi.matchConfidence, bi.billingPlatform
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Mega%' OR bi.customerExternalId = 'C0159'
ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC, bi.description
LIMIT 20;

-- Check service_billing_assignments structure
DESCRIBE service_billing_assignments;

       bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.lineAmount, bi.accountCode, bi.category,

FROM billing_items bi

-- Check service_billing_assignments structure
DESCRIBE service_billing_assignments;
